texts.text: Plots Status No BLANK records in Current Measurement Period No Blank records for past measurements Check all past measurements. All Plots should begin with an initial install then re measurement or not measured - etc. Illogical Plot Status codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual "can add to notes here"
Species No BLANK records in Current Measurement Period No BLANK records in Past measurements Illogical Species codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual "can add to notes here"

Tree History (Status or Class) No BLANK records in Current Measurement Period Past measurement can have Blank Records Illogical Tree History (Status or Class) codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Past "dead/harvest/thinned" can't be " LIVE " this measurement Past "LIVE" can't be "Old dead/harvest" this measurement needs to be "new dead/harvest, missing" Past "new dead/harvest/thin" can't be "new dead/harvest/thin" this measurement needs to be "old dead/harvest" Past "old dead/harvest" can't be "new dead/harvest" this measurement needs to be "old dead/harvest" Past "thinned" can't be "thinned" this measurement needs to be "old harvest/cut" "can add to notes here"

Radial Increment Questionable Radial Increment Check crosstab - is it reasonable Decreasing DBH for LIVE tree - verify if truly decreasing. If it is... Radial Increment required check if past IDBH needs to be fixed with the radial increment "can add to notes here"

IDBH No BLANK records for LIVE trees in current measurement period Blank records acceptable this measurement for old dead/harvest, missing Questionable IDBH Sort data largest to smallest to check range of IDBH (is it reasonable) Sort data smallest to largest to check range of IDBH (is it reasonable) Check for large growth between periods check historical growth of the tree to ensure its correct if not highlight as error Decreasing DBH for LIVE tree - verify if truly decreasing. If it is... check if Radial Increment was taken check if past IDBH needs to be fixed with the radial increment Decreasing DBH acceptable for dead trees, trees can shrink No IDBH for harvest/thin, *old mortality trees *some projects get DBH for new/old dead trees "can add to notes here"

Total Height BLANK records acceptable in all periods if subsample height for regression Are all Minor Plot codes correct for Subsample Height Low species count should have height (recommended for inventory) If total height is required on all trees (LIVE, new/old dead) check all Check for large height growth between periods Decreasing height for LIVE tree - verify if truly decreasing. If it is... Problem code references Broken Top/Dead Top etc. No height for broken top, unless estimating height check manual -or- was the height entered wrong No Height for harvest/thin, *old mortality trees *some projects require Height for new/old dead trees (carbon data) Questionable Heights Sort largest to smallest - is it reasonable Sort smallest to largest - is it reasonable "can add to notes here"

Minor Plot Illogical Minor Plot codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual All LIVE (new dead) tree has a minor plot code Subsample Height references correct Minor Plot Code (height regression) Subsample for Tree Size Group (expansion factor will be different) May only collect pole timber on a smaller plot for inventory etc. "can add to notes here"
Stem Count Illogical Stem Count - these should all be 1 Used for Woodland Species "can add to notes here"

Crown Ratio Check Field Manual on how this is collected Nearest 5%, Visual estimate, Code Illogical Crown Ratio codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Nearest 5% - need to check and change - some may be visual estimate Ensure all measurements are collected the same Missing Crown Ratio for all LIVE trees No Crown Ratio for new/old dead, harvest/thin, missing Questionable Crown Ratio Sort largest to smallest, is it reasonable, can't be over 100% Sort smallest to largest, is it reasonable "can add to notes here"

Tree Age Check Field Manual on how this is collected Codes or Estimated Age Illogical Tree Age codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Ensure all measurements are collected the same Missing Tree Age for all LIVE trees No Tree Age for new/old dead, harvest/thin, missing Questionable Tree Age Sort largest to smallest, is it reasonable Sort smallest to largest, is it reasonable "can add to notes here"

Defect Check Field Manual on how this is collected Codes , Estimated, Nearest 5% Illogical Defect codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Ensure all measurements are collected the same Missing Defect for all LIVE trees with valid Problem Code No Defect for LIVE trees with NO Problem Code=0 No Defect for new/old dead, harvest/thin, missing Questionable Defect Sort largest to smallest, is it reasonable Sort smallest to largest, is it reasonable "can add to notes here"

Problem Illogical Problem codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing Problem code for all LIVE trees (no problem = 0) Blank is valid if inventory requires a blank for no problem New dead/harvest - if it requires a Problem code No Problem code for old dead, old harvest/thin, missing "can add to notes here"

Severity Illogical Severity codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing Seveirty Codes for valid Problem code for LIVE and *new dead/harvest Depending on Project - Severity Codes list different for Problem Code groups ex: Bark Beetle group - may have severity code of 1,2,3,4,9 No Severity code for old dead, old harvest/thin, missing "can add to notes here"

Problem Illogical Problem codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing Problem code for all LIVE trees (no problem = 0) Blank is valid if inventory requires a blank for no problem New dead/harvest - if it requires a Problem code No Problem code for old dead, old harvest/thin, missing "can add to notes here"

Severity Illogical Severity codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing Seveirty Codes for valid Problem code for LIVE and *new dead/harvest Depending on Project - Severity Codes list different for Problem Code groups ex: Bark Beetle group - may have severity code of 1,2,3,4,9 No Severity code for old dead, old harvest/thin, missing "can add to notes here"
Snag Illogical Snag codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing Snag codes for valid new/old dead No Snag code for LIVE, new/old harvest/thin, missing "can add to notes here"
Dwarf Mistletoe Rating (DMR) Illogical DMR codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual Missing DMR code if Problem code specified DMR problem "can add to notes here"
Species No BLANK records in Current Measurement Period No BLANK records in Past measurements Illogical Species codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual "can add to notes here"
IDBH No BLANK records in current and past measurement period Illogical IDBH Codes Check against code in Field Manual IDBH not using Codes - check if reasonable "can add to notes here"
Minor Plot No BLANK records in current and past measurement period Illogical Minor Plot Codes Check against code in Field Manual "can add to notes here"

Stem Count No BLANK records in current and past measurement period Ste m Count Check Field Manual on requirement Illogical stem counts ex: -4, 1000 Limit on Stem count is 250, cant exceed let Lead Know "can add to notes here"

Measurement Date Required for all Measured Plots This is used to develop the GMP No BLANK records in current and past measurement period if measured Blanks acceptable for dropped, missed "can add to notes here"
Elevation Required for all Measured Plots Illogical elevation check range - are they reasonable "can add to notes here"
Aspect Required for all Measured Plots Missing codes Illogical Aspect code Check against codes in Field Manual "can add to notes here"

Slope Percent Check Field Manual on how this is collected Nearest 5%, estimate, Code Illogical Code or range Check against code in Field Manual Check range - are they reasonable - over 100% "can add to notes here"

Stockability Percent Not missing for current measured plot Check Field Manual on how this is collected Nearest 5%, estimate, Code Illogical Code or range Check against code in Field Manual Check range - are they reasonable - over 100% "can add to notes here"
Cover Type Not m issing for current measured plot Illogical Code Check against code in Field Manual "can add to notes here"

Stand Age Not missing for current measured plot Check Field Manual on how this was collected Code, estimated Illogical Code Check against code in Field Manual Estimated Age, check range if reasonable "can add to notes here"
SI Species Illogical Species codes Check against valid codes in Field Manual "can add to notes here"
SI IDBH Illogical IDBH Range Check dbh range if reasonable "can add to notes here"
SI Total Height Illogical Height Range Check height range if reasonable "can add to notes here"
SI Age Illogical Age Check age range if reasonable "can add to notes here"
SI Growth Illogical growth Check growth range if reasonable "can add to notes here"
